body:
This PR fixes CI:
 - We converted the NC files to a tarball (I'm not sure why, but this is fine)
 - And the remaining NC files were cleaned up / deleted. So, our reproducibility logic could not find them.
 - This PR attempts to extract the NC files from the tarball before comparing against main.

cc @Sbozzolo, @LenkaNovak
title: Extract nc files from tar for reproducibility tests

body:
Update to RRTMGP 0.11.0

Content
- Change VMR indices
- Remove `random_lw` and `random_sw` from `RRTMGPModel`
- Change all instances of `solar_zenith_angle` to `cos_zenith`
- Separate the PADE and default lookup tables
- Change `update_net_fluxes!` to use `face_sw_flux_up - face_sw_flux_dn` instead of `face_sw_flux` since it is not being set correctly. 

Job IDs `diagnostic_edmfx_aquaplanet` and `sphere_aquaplanet_rhoe_equilmoist_allsky_gw_raw_zonallyasymmetric` have MSE changes, but @szy21 checked the plots (thank you!).

May break coupler compability, since RRTMGPI is changing.
title: Update to new RRTMGP interface

body: This PR is a followup on #2603.
title: Remove soft-fail soft_fail
